{
  "claims": [
    "The opioid crisis has claimed the lives of over 6,800 Californians last year.",
    "An average of 53 people die a month from accidental drug overdoses in Assemblymember Haney's district.",
    "Drug overdoses have cost the nation more lives than COVID-19.",
    "The youngest patient addicted to fentanyl was just 12 years old.",
    "Some youths have been reported to be using as many as 10 fentanyl pills a day.",
    "The fentanyl crisis in Orange County is described as a tsunami that has swept in at breakneck pace.",
    "In 2020, approximately 668 people died from an overdose in Orange County, with 432 of those cases involving large amounts of fentanyl."
  ]
